# paren-fuzz mismatches (seed=0xbadc0de1, corpus=100)
# 12 mismatches recorded; see README.md for format.

--- mismatch 1 (family=seed) ---
SQL:      SELECT * FROM (SELECT 1) SELECT 1
pg:       reject(42601)
omni:     subquery
pg_err:   42601: syntax error at or near "SELECT"
omni_err: 
duration: 1.002417ms

--- mismatch 2 (family=reserved-misuse) ---
SQL:      SELECT * FROM (SELECT a FROM T WHERE a > 0) SELECT 1
pg:       reject(42601)
omni:     subquery
pg_err:   42601: syntax error at or near "SELECT"
omni_err: 
duration: 990.834µs

--- mismatch 3 (family=reserved-misuse) ---
SQL:      SELECT * FROM (SELECT a, b FROM U) SELECT 1
pg:       reject(42601)
omni:     subquery
pg_err:   42601: syntax error at or near "SELECT"
omni_err: 
duration: 864.292µs

--- mismatch 4 (family=reserved-misuse) ---
SQL:      SELECT * FROM (SELECT a, b FROM U) SELECT 1
pg:       reject(42601)
omni:     subquery
pg_err:   42601: syntax error at or near "SELECT"
omni_err: 
duration: 1.00975ms

--- mismatch 5 (family=seed) ---
SQL:      SELECT * FROM (T JOIN U)
pg:       reject(42601)
omni:     joined_table
pg_err:   42601: syntax error at or near ")"
omni_err: 
duration: 1.0655ms

--- mismatch 6 (family=seed) ---
SQL:      SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2)) SELECT 1
pg:       reject(42601)
omni:     subquery
pg_err:   42601: syntax error at or near "SELECT"
omni_err: 
duration: 1.0245ms

--- mismatch 7 (family=seed) ---
SQL:      SELECT * FROM (WITH w AS (SELECT 1) SELECT * FROM w) SELECT 1
pg:       reject(42601)
omni:     subquery
pg_err:   42601: syntax error at or near "SELECT"
omni_err: 
duration: 991.375µs

--- mismatch 8 (family=reserved-misuse) ---
SQL:      SELECT * FROM (WITH w AS (SELECT 1, 2) SELECT * FROM w) SELECT 1
pg:       reject(42601)
omni:     subquery
pg_err:   42601: syntax error at or near "SELECT"
omni_err: 
duration: 1.03025ms

--- mismatch 9 (family=joined-table) ---

pg:       reject(42601)
omni:     joined_table

omni_err: 
duration: 990.834µs

--- mismatch 10 (family=seed) ---

pg:       reject(42601)

--- mismatch 11 (family=joined-table) ---

pg:       reject(42601)

omni_err: 
duration: 1.002209ms

--- mismatch 12 (family=seed) ---

pg:       reject(42601)
